info.english_meaning: to burstto break opento split open to destroy to shatter explode
info.hindI_arTa: hiMsA karanA nazwa honAviKeranA visPowa honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' sPowayet sPowatIti dve Bede viSaraRe kramAt ' (Slo.71) iti devaH  ' ayaM pAWo mEtreyAdInAm ' iti mADavaH   ' sPuwa ' iti candraH  ' viSaraRe vikAsa ca ' iti kASakftsnaH  ' sPuwi ityapi kecit - sPuRwati ' iti kOmudI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AsPowayattaTA''kASe DarmaH prApto mayeti vE' (BA0 SAM0 26141) bAhuSabdamakarodityarTaH
'tasyAsPowitaSabdena mahatA SrotrapAtinA peturvihaNgamAstatra cEtyapAlASca mohitAH' (rA0 547) .. AsPowitam bAhutAqanaSabdaH
